  <Compare

      ],
      standings: {
        title: 'Where every economy stands',
        subtitle: 'Commodity export dependence, per country and per region, per cent',

      compareView: {
        dnaTitle: 'Commodity DNA – what each economy exports',
        dnaSubtitle: 'Share of merchandise exports by product group, 2022–2024',
        dnaDescription: 'Share of agricultural, energy, mining and other merchandise exports. A larger commodity segment means greater dependence on raw materials.'
      },
      profile: {
        exportsHeading: 'Exports',
        importsHeading: 'Imports',
        dependenceOverTime: {
          title: 'Commodity export dependence over time',
          subtitle: 'Annual share, per cent, 1995–2024',
          description: 'The trajectory reveals how commodity export reliance has shifted over three decades – shaped by price cycles, structural change and global shocks.',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025).',
        },
        exportsOverTime: {
          title: 'Commodity exports over time',
          subtitle: 'Billions of dollars, 1995–2024',
          description: 'Total commodity export value places the economy\'s raw-material trade in a long-run context, capturing the combined effect of price and volume changes.',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025).',
        },
        leadingExports: {
          title: 'Three leading commodity exports',
          subtitle: 'Per cent of all allocated product exports, 2022–2024',
          description: 'Concentration in a small number of commodities amplifies exposure to sector-specific price shocks and supply disruptions.',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025), SITC Rev. 3 classification.',
        },
        topMarkets: {
          title: 'Top destination markets',
          subtitle: 'Percentage of total merchandise exports, 2022–2024',
          description: 'Geographic concentration of export destinations adds a second layer of vulnerability alongside product concentration.',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025), bilateral trade flows.',
        },
        importsOverTime: {
          title: 'Commodity imports over time',
          subtitle: 'Billions of dollars, 1995–2024',
          description: 'Total commodity import value tracks the economy\'s reliance on global commodity markets as a buyer, shaped by domestic demand, industrialisation and global price cycles.',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025).',
        },
        foodImportsOverTime: {
          title: 'Food imports over time',
          subtitle: 'Billions of dollars, 1995–2024',
          description: 'The long-run trajectory of food import values reveals how exposure to global agricultural markets – and the shocks that move them – has grown or receded over time.',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025).',
        },
        energyImportsOverTime: {
          title: 'Energy imports over time',
          subtitle: 'Billions of dollars, 1996–2024',
          description: 'Fuel import trends show how dependent the economy has become on global energy markets, with values driven by both volume and price cycles in oil and gas.',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025).',
        },
        foodNetImports: {
          title: 'Net food imports',
          subtitle: 'Per cent of merchandise trade, 2012–2014 vs 2022–2024',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025).',
        },
        energyNetImports: {
          title: 'Net energy imports',
          subtitle: 'Per cent of merchandise trade, 2012–2014 vs 2022–2024',
          source: 'UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD) calculations, based on UNCTADstat (2025).',
        },
        contextHeading: 'Context',
        macroContext: {
          title: 'Macro context',
          subtitle: 'GDP and income level',
          description: 'The size and income level of the economy shapes how commodity dependence translates into development outcomes and fiscal vulnerability.',

        socialContext: {
          title: 'Social context',
          subtitle: 'Labour market and human development',
